items.text: Hi Deborah, This is a reminder that your chemistry lab safety training is scheduled for Monday, October 5, at 3:00 PM in Kepler Hall, Room 118. Please purchase approved goggles ($5) from the stockroom beforehand and arrive on time. Thanks, Lab Coordinator

questions.stem: According to the email, what should Deborah do before the training?
questions.explanation: The email asks Deborah to purchase approved goggles from the stockroom beforehand, which paraphrases to buying goggles at the stockroom before the session.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the training session?

options.A: It is optional for lab students
options.B: It requires students to wear goggles
options.C: It occurs several times each week
options.D: It includes a written final exam

questions.explanation: Because participants must obtain approved goggles beforehand, it can be inferred the training requires students to wear protective eyewear.

items.text: Dear Olivia, We received your request for a replacement student ID card. Please visit the Campus Card Office in Sherman Hall by Friday, November 13, to pay the $10 fee and collect your new card. Bring a photo ID. Best, Card Services

questions.stem: According to the email, what should Olivia bring to the Card Office?
questions.explanation: The email instructs Olivia to bring a photo ID, which the option restates as photo identification.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the email?

options.A: The office charges no service fee
options.B: The old card remains fully valid
options.C: The new card is delivered by mail

questions.explanation: Because Olivia must collect the card by Friday, November 13, it can be inferred that the pickup has a firm deadline.

items.text: Notice: Campus wireless internet will be unavailable in all residence halls on Thursday, September 24, from 1:00 AM to 4:00 AM. The three-hour interruption is required for scheduled network upgrades. Wired connections in the library will remain active during this period.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will the wireless service be unavailable?
questions.explanation: The notice states the outage runs from 1:00 AM to 4:00 AM on Thursday, September 24.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the notice?

options.A: All internet access on campus stops

questions.explanation: Since wired connections in the library will remain active, it can be inferred that library visitors keep internet access during the outage.

items.text: Notice: The drinking fountains on the second floor of Whitman Hall will be closed for repairs from Monday to Wednesday, October 12-14. Bottled water is available from the first-floor vending machine for $1.50. Please use the fountains on other floors during this period.

questions.stem: According to the notice, how much does bottled water from the vending machine cost?
questions.explanation: The notice states that bottled water is available from the first-floor vending machine for $1.50.

questions.stem: According to the notice, which floor's fountains will be closed?
questions.explanation: The notice specifies that the drinking fountains on the second floor of Whitman Hall will be closed for repairs.
